evidence_refs.source_quote: Based on the existing Bx41 route

decisions.rationale: Observation describes the existing (pre-SBS) Bx41 route as background context for the proposed Webster Avenue SBS — includes both the base Bx41 route and LTD service. This is not the same real-world thing as route_webster-ave-sbs (the SBS route BX41+), and no existing registry record captures this generic pre-SBS Bx41 reference. Must be registered as new.

Observation refers to Bx12 SBS used as an example of SBS features and results. The observation already resolves to its own base_record_id (route_bx12-plus), which IS the canonical Bx12 SBS record. Per rule: never link to own base_record_id; the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, so decision is new.
